/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/weather_client.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/weather_client.dir/weather_client_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/weather_client.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/weather_client.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o weather_client  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
